reach_why: Extends known concerns about shared-model evaluation and framing error, but does not open wholly unprecedented explanatory territory.
novelty_why: Non-obviously links ontological bias, problem selection, and judge-generator coupling into one failure mode.
falsifiable_why: Testable by comparing shared-family judges against independent judges on misframed tasks and nonsense-premise handling.
explanation: Shared biases can make systems confidently validate polished explanations for wrongly framed problems.
